ValidationRule.description: Only let administrators change the Underwritten AUM value on an opportunity once it is set by an SGM and the Opportunity is in Signed or Joined.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Joined"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Signed") ), IsChanged( Underwritten_AUM__c), $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Once an Opportunity is Signed or in Joined, only an admin can change the Underwritten AUM. Please speak to an administrator for this.
